name: Scallops Venetian-Style (Cape Sante Alla Veneziana)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash scallops under cold running water.
2. Pat scallops dry with paper towels.
3. Heat olive oil in a medium skillet over low heat.
4. Add scallops, garlic, and parsley to the skillet.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Cook over low heat for 5 to 6 minutes or until golden brown, stirring occasionally.
7. Add lemon juice and mix well.
8. Place on a warm platter and serve immediately.
